name: anomaly_explanation_fabricated_percent_fails
description: Adversarial anomaly explanation: citations are real and the raw values are quoted correctly, but the prose states a DERIVED swing percentage (42.6) that appears in neither cited row's value/detail strings — the AI layer must never originate a number, even a correct-looking one. Expected: FAIL on fabricated_number_count.

claims.text: [AI-generated draft | provider=stub] The vrm value jumped from 11500.00 to 16400.00 between consecutive periods, a swing of 42.6 percent.
The computed vrm value for the period 2026-04-01 to 2026-05-01 is 11500.00 (calculation version 0.2.0). Its recorded input coverage is 0.97.
The computed vrm value for the period 2026-05-01 to 2026-06-01 is 16400.00 (calculation version 0.2.0). Its recorded input coverage is 0.96.
